nasb.text: As silver is melted in the furnace, so you will be melted in the midst of it; and you will know that I, the Lord, have poured out My wrath on you.’ ”

esv.text: As silver is melted in a furnace, so you shall be melted in the midst of it, and you shall know that I am the Lord; I have poured out my wrath upon you.”

cnv.text: 銀子怎樣在爐中熔化，你們也必照樣在城中熔化；你們就知道我耶和華把我的烈怒倒在你身上。’”

ccb.text: 你们要在城中熔化，就像银在炼炉中熔化。你们就知道我耶和华已将我的烈怒倾倒在你们身上。’”
